text: The benefits were a very gradual reduction in the appearance of sun spots on the skin. The spots themselves never disappeared but lightened over a period of time. The general appearance of the skin also improved slightly but it did not prevent new spots from appearing as I noticed that they did, although I suspect that the cream probably kept them lighter than they would have been. Discontinuation did make the darkness come back into the sun spots after about 4 to 6 months however. There were really no side effects; perhaps the tiniest of tingling at the ery first couple of applications then none after. Topical application of the cream daily, usually at night. The recommended amount was "pea sized" but I found it too thick to get this amount to massage into the whole face.
